emails.subject: Re: Legal folks in ESA
emails.body: Re: Legal folks in ESA I want to be involved as we are in the process of signing up employment contracts with Sami Arap, Louise Wantanabe and Vicki Martinez. John Novak and I need to approve all the changes. Thanks. Mark David Oxley/ENRON@enronXgate 06/01/2001 03:27 PM
